steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “there is no better example of the form” establishes that Mildred Pitts Walter's work is unsurpassed—it's the supreme standard.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Eclipsed means surpassed or exceeded—a word expressing one thing going beyond another in quality. The other three lack this comparative meaning: convened (gathered), cited (referenced), and augmented (increased).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
